sections.paragraph:
ψηλαφάω (ψηλᾰφάω,)
Etym. mostly in pres.
Etym. ψάω

1. to feel or grope about (epic for -άων), of the blinded Cyclops, Od.; ψηλαφῶντες ὥσπερ ἐν σκότῳ Plat.


Etym. like a blind man or one in the dark, χερσὶ ψηλαφόων

2. c. acc. rei, to feel about for, search after, Ar., NTest.

II. to feel, touch, stroke, Xen., NTest.
